MINI MINUTES: Appearances on MON-JUN-10-2019:

Michael Heath (T: 415.931.4207), attorney for Plaintiff / Cross-Defendant AMIT PATEL who is also present;
Jee Soo Kim (T: 925.452.8271), attorney for Defendants / Cross-Complainant ACE ROOFING SF, INC. and YONG CHAN CHON. Defendant Mr. Chon is also present.

The Court and respective counsel meet and conduct settlement discussions. At the conclusion of the settlement conference, this case does not settle. The Court directs counsel to return to Department 206 for trial assignment forthwith.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: L. Fong; Matter not Reported; Dept. 606.
